decisions.rationale: CHAT-06 decompose scope and AC-3 cover crisis hotline card hierarchy and mutual exclusivity with bTIUt — not ButtonClicked coaching-prompt workflow (b94a4040 → bTIqq). Implemented cards are 988/Crisis Text Line/SAMHSA with tel:/sms: anchors; functional_audit FV-3 passes and criteria_audit AC-3 passes. Decompose triage already assigned coaching-prompt click parity to implement wave via CHAT-05 useNewConversation, but current IR cards are crisis resources where tel/sms is correct behavior. CHAT-03 depends_on gate needs mounted welcome panel when ?conversation= absent — satisfied. Defer coaching-prompt NewThing+ChangePage wiring to CHAT-05-chat-messaging-and-create-flow if/when coaching-style suggestion cards are added.

Named ui_refs ai_RNbBHXcI, ai_RNbBHXcO, ai_RNbBHXcU, ai_RNbBHXca are Icon elements in bTHDZ____root.json; implementation mounts Lucide Heart/Phone/MessageSquare/Stethoscope glyphs with data-bubble-id markers and Icon_primary_ tokens. criteria_audit AC-2 passes and all icon ui_evidence entries pass with Lucide stand-in notes. Brownfield frontend uses lucide-react throughout; mirrors CRISIS-01-crisis-support-reusable C-1 and SHELL-02-sidebar-navigation C-2 deferrals — glyph library parity is optional visual polish, not a composable contract. CHAT-03 downstream depends_on needs welcome panel structure and crisis tel/sms anchors, not Bubble phosphor glyph shapes. Defer Bubble icon asset mapping to DS-01/icon primitive polish wave.

Disclaimer ai_RNbBHXce is correctly nested under ai_RNbBHXcL per ir/inventory.json parent_id (prior triage C-1 fix verified); criteria_audit AC-1 passes and ui_evidence ai_RNbBHXce passes. border-t/pt-3 Tailwind utilities are layout polish not grounded in IR presentation or style_ref on ai_RNbBHXce — low visual impact and does not fail any AC or ui_evidence check. No downstream depends_on consumer gates on disclaimer separator styling. Defer separator resolution from Group_card_muted_ sibling spacing or IR padding to chat welcome fidelity polish alongside C-2 icon assets.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 coaching-prompt ButtonClicked parity to CHAT-05 (crisis tel/sms cards satisfy current ACs/FV-3); C-2 Lucide vs Bubble icon glyph parity to DS-01 polish wave (CRISIS-01/SHELL-02 precedent); C-3 disclaimer border-t separator to welcome-panel fidelity polish.
